title: User can log in with valid credentials
description: As a user, I can enter my username and password and be redirected to the dashboard

title: User can reset forgotten password
description: As a user, I can click Forgot Password and receive a reset email

title: User can view product catalogue
description: As a user, I can browse all available products with filters

title: User can add items to cart
description: As a user, I can add products to my shopping cart and see the updated count

title: User can complete checkout
description: As a user, I can enter payment details and receive an order confirmation

title: User can view order history
description: As a user, I can see a list of my past orders with their statuses

title: Admin can manage user accounts
description: As an admin, I can create, edit, and deactivate user accounts

title: Search returns relevant results
description: As a user, I can search by keyword and get relevant products within 2 seconds

title: Application loads within 3 seconds
description: The home page must fully load within 3 seconds on a standard broadband connection

title: Cookie consent banner is dismissible
description: As a user, I can accept or decline cookies and the banner should not reappear

title: User can update profile details
description: As a user, I can edit my name, email, and avatar from the profile page

title: Navigation links are accessible via keyboard
description: All top-level navigation items must be reachable using Tab and Enter keys
